stories.title: Israeli 'double-tap' strike kills three rescue workers in Lebanon, officials say
stories.description: They are among nine people officials say were killed in successive attacks on Tuesday.

stories.title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
stories.description: In the two months since the deadly strike, the US defence department has said only that the incident is under investigation.

stories.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
stories.description: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.

stories.title: Israeli strikes kill 14 in Lebanon amid ongoing ceasefire
stories.description: The US announced three days ago that the ceasefire was extended by three weeks after talks.

stories.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
stories.description: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

stories.title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
stories.description: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

stories.title: Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire to be extended by three weeks
stories.description: Envoys from the two countries met in Washington as the fragile truce was due to expire on Sunday.

stories.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
stories.description: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
stories.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries has been extended by three weeks after talks in Washington.

stories.title: US forces board ship suspected of heading to Iran port
stories.description: US Marines on Tuesday boarded a commercial ship in the Arabian Sea that was suspected of trying to violate the American blockade of Iranian ports, the US military said. stories.title: As war nears two months, displaced Lebanese families sink into despair
stories.description: It has been nearly two months, ​but Rabih Khreiss still has trouble recognising his new life. The father-of-nine could once put food on the table through his car workshop in southern Lebanon, but is now barely surviving in a tent in the capital Beirut. Like so many others, the Kh...

stories.title: Airlines worldwide cancel flights, raise fares amid Middle East conflict
stories.description: Ryanair, Transavia, Volotea and other low-cost airlines are feeling the financial pain from high jet fuel prices as a result of the Middle East war and are cutting flights. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has taken a huge chunk of oil supplies off the market, sending the pric...

stories.title: King Charles, Trump toast ties despite Iran tensions
stories.description: Britain's King Charles and Donald Trump hailed their countries' longstanding ties at a White House state dinner Tuesday -- despite the US president claiming the monarch agreed with him on Iran's nuclear weapons.

stories.title: Inside Tehran’s main airport as more flights take off during ceasefire
stories.description: Al Jazeera’s Tohid Asadi has been seeing more flights take off at the main airport in Iran’s capital.

stories.title: Is Iran’s oil storage nearly full – and will it have to cut production?
stories.description: Experts predict Iran could gradually scale back oil production if the US naval blockade of Hormuz persists.

stories.title: How Hezbollah’s fibre optic drones test Israel’s sophisticated radar system
stories.description: Immune to jamming and invisible to radar, the low-cost drones are piercing through Israel’s multibillion-dollar systems.

stories.title: ‘No more Mr Nice Guy’: Trump warns Iran to ‘get smart’ over stalled talks
stories.description: The US president has railed against Iran's proposal on Truth Social as uncertainty over the fragile ceasefire grows.

stories.title: How US and Iran are playing a crypto cat-and-mouse game over sanctions
stories.description: Iranian authorities and people are increasingly using cryptocurrencies to evade sanctions. The US is playing catch-up.

stories.title: Iranian officials absent from pre-World Cup football events in Canada
stories.description: It is unclear whether football officials from Iran were issued Canadian visas to attend AFC and FIFA congresses.

stories.title: 5 sentenced to life in Bahrain for plotting 'terrorist acts' with Iran
stories.description: Five people were sentenced to life in Bahrain on Tuesday for plotting “terrorist and hostile acts” with Iran, which bombarded the tiny Gulf state during the Middle East war. stories.title: Britain's King Charles meets Trump in bid to salvage ties
stories.description: Britain’s King Charles III met Donald Trump at the White House early Tuesday, kicking off a high-stakes state visit shadowed by transatlantic tensions and a new alleged attempt to assassinate the US president. stories.title: US spy agencies examine how Iran would react to Trump declaring victory: sources
stories.description: US intelligence agencies are studying how Iran would respond if President Donald Trump were to declare a unilateral victory in the two-month-old war that ​has killed thousands and become a political liability for the White House, two US officials and a person familiar with the ma...

stories.title: Iran executed 21, arrested 4,000 since West Asia war began: U.N.
stories.description: The report said many detainees had been victims of forced disappearances, torture or "cruel, inhuman and degrading treatment", including forced confessions
